name: agoraflux
description: AGORAFLUX clean country risk dataset and single-country API for Vercel Hobby.

scripts.build: npm run build-platform-data && npm run check && npm run validate-data
scripts.check: node --check server/country-store.js && node --check shared/country-profile.js && node --check shared/country-formatting.js && node --check scripts/update-country-data.js && node --check scripts/validate-dataset.js && node --check scripts/build-platform-data.js && node --check components/app.js && node --check components/platform.js && node --check components/charts.js && node --check pages/platform-pages.js
